text: Hello? Hello? Good afternoon. My name is Lina. I'm just checking something as per our records from your local county in the state of Texas. So just quickly confirm both Part A and B of your Medicare are currently active, right? No. Sorry, but you do not seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
